## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Any specific implementation ideas?

## Alternatives
Have you considered alternative approaches?

## Which Pillar(s)?
- [ ] Pillar I (Non-Maleficence) – Protection of life
- [ ] Pillar II (Ethical Agency) – Responsible power
- [ ] Pillar III (Connectedness) – Open knowledge & 1+1=3
- [ ] New philosophy / cross-cutting concern
